title: 日本ダービーの後に・『そうだね』

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I... won?
choice_data_list: That was amazing! You were incredible!
That was amazing! You were incredible!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's right... Yeah! I...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I really did it! I won!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... sniffle... Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week bawls her eyes out as we celebrate
her victory. The crowd continues to cheer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Aw, my eyes are gonna be so puffy tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Promise not to laugh if my face looks all weird,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. You're so kind, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hm? My phone?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's my mom!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-hello?! Uh-huh... Yeah, uh-huh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I see. So you watched the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mmhmm... Yep. With the photo of my birth mom
too...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How was I, Mom? You know what? I...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've improved a bit, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without hearing the response, I could tell by her
face exactly what her mother said.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's probably exhausted, so after the call, I
decide to take her back to her dorm. But...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Trainer? How about we go grab something to
eat now? If you're up for it, that is.
choice_data_list: To celebrate your victory in the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, there's that. But there's also another
thing to celebrate today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You becoming a Derby trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's order whatever we want and eat as much as
we can together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It's not always just about the food when it comes to me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Say, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How... did I do today?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It makes me so happy to hear you say that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's sparkling eyes grow narrow as a
smile spreads across her face.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Let's eat a ton of delicious food, then
get right back to work tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer!
